subject: Overdue Invoice INV-2024-001 for ₹345,000
body:
Dear Rajesh Kapoor,

We hope this email finds you well. We wanted to reach out to you regarding your invoice INV-2024-001, which was due on 2026-05-08. As of today, the invoice is 3 days overdue. We understand that oversights can happen, and we're here to help.

The amount due is ₹345,000. To avoid any additional delays, we kindly request that you settle this amount at your earliest convenience. You can pay now by visiting our payment link: https://pay.acmecorp.com/invoice/INV-2024-001. Alternatively, if you have any questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to call us at +91-9876543210.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter, and we look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,
Acme Corp Finance Department

subject: Overdue Payment: INV-2024-002 - ₹128,500
body:
Dear Priya Sharma,

We are writing to follow up on the payment for Invoice INV-2024-002, which is now 10 days overdue. As per our records, the amount of ₹128,500 is still pending. We understand that unforeseen delays can occur, and we would appreciate it if you could confirm a payment date for the outstanding amount.

For your convenience, you can make the payment using the following link: https://pay.acmecorp.com/invoice/INV-2024-002. If you have already made the payment, please disregard this notice and accept our apologies for the oversight.

Should you require any assistance or have questions, please do not hesitate to contact us at +91-9876543210.

We look forward to hearing back from you soon and resolving this matter promptly.

Best regards,
Acme Corp Finance Department
